sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπιγραφή

- Transliteration: Epigraphe

- Phonetic: ep-ig-raf-ay'

- Definition:

1. an inscription, title

a. in the NT of an inscription in black letters upon a whitened tablet

b. of the inscription on a coin

- Origin: from G1924

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G1924; an inscription: - superscription.
